hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.lua) STYLUA=$(command -v stylua || echo "$HOME/.local/share/nvim/mason/bin/stylua"); [ -x "$STYLUA" ] && "$STYLUA" "$f" ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.lua) command -v luajit >/dev/null && { luajit -b "$f" /dev/null 2>/tmp/cc_luaerr || { echo "Lua syntax error in $f:" >&2; cat /tmp/cc_luaerr >&2; exit 2; }; } ;; esac
